title: Senior Doctor - Vijaya Diagnostics - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Vijaya Diagnostics - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Vijaya Diagnostics in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vijaya Diagnostics:
Vijaya Diagnostics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
